user.title: EcoFlow Delta Pro
user.description: Connect to your EcoFlow Delta Pro using its local network IP address. Requires firmware 3.0.2.21 or newer.

data_description.host: The local IP address of your EcoFlow Delta Pro (e.g. 192.168.1.50)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to device. Check the IP address, port, and that the device is online with firmware 3.0.2.21+.
